question: A company tracks average website sign-ups per year. According to the chart, which of the following statements is most appropriate?

options.A: Sign-ups in the latest year are now permanently lower than before.
options.B: The latest year clearly has the lowest sign-ups of the entire period.
options.C: The latest year shows a sharp decline in sign-ups compared to the previous year.
options.D: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this partial-year data.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (902 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 2,814 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
